series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications or correspondence associated with cemetery registration.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on computer ; Microform: Images on microfiche are be permanently maintained. ; Electronic: Images on computer are be permanently maintained
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Other ; Electronic: Other
